scope: Access role name uniqueness race for tenant-scoped access profiles
expected: DB schema and migration define unique index access_profiles_tenant_id_name_uidx on (tenant_id, name).
Concurrent access role create requests with different ids and the same name return one 201 and one 409 access_role_name_taken.
Concurrent access role updates for two roles to the same name return one 200 and one 409 access_role_name_taken.
Readback after each race shows exactly one role with the contested name.

red.result: failed as expected before fix: migration file 0050_access_profiles_name_unique.sql missing and schema indexes only contained access_profiles_tenant_id_idx.
red.appDbNote: The first app.db RED attempt was blocked by local DATABASE_URL pointing at another Postgres on 55432: password authentication failed for user kiss_pm. docker compose Postgres was healthy on 55433, so GREEN was run with explicit DATABASE_URL.

behavior: Added migration 0050_access_profiles_name_unique.sql creating the same unique index if not exists.
Added DB race coverage for concurrent create/update access-role name conflicts and readback cardinality.

green.migration: Duplicate precheck returned []; corepack pnpm db:migrate against DATABASE_URL=postgres://kiss_pm:kiss_pm_dev_password@127.0.0.1:55433/kiss_pm reported no pending migrations; pg_indexes verified access_profiles_tenant_id_name_uidx exists.
green.persistenceTests: corepack pnpm --filter @kiss-pm/persistence test -- packages/persistence/src/migration.test.ts packages/persistence/src/schema.test.ts -> 6 files passed; 71 tests passed.
green.appDbTests: cmd /c "set DATABASE_URL=postgres://kiss_pm:kiss_pm_dev_password@127.0.0.1:55433/kiss_pm&& node_modules\\.bin\\vitest.cmd run --config vitest.db.config.ts apps/api/src/app.db.test.ts -t \"access role\"" -> 1 file passed; 5 tests passed; 23 skipped.
green.warning: Existing Vite/esbuild warning about duplicate assignment.delete case in packages/domain/src/planning/commandReducer.ts remains unrelated.

migrationRisk: Before applying to a non-empty environment, precheck duplicate access_profiles rows grouped by tenant_id/name. CREATE UNIQUE INDEX will fail if duplicates already exist.
remainingRisk: This closes only access-role name DB uniqueness race coverage. Broader write-flow race/idempotency matrix remains open for unrelated flows.
